summaries: test for time of diff zones
DAN: Align CSS after DAN header filter component changed from bootstrap to prime
Following dialogs new design- change the small and the medium dialogs to be dynamic per resolution
RF versioning- add/remove event is Decision and RF version change
QA: DM is stuck for moment and Getting SWW error when user associate a decision to KS and click 'OK'
Getting error "Deployment Error: Code Generation failed" after test case execution
descriptions: test for time of diff zones in india
Please check the code and working buttons for verification

DAN header filter component is changed from bootstrap to prime. Please check and fix any CSS changes. 
One of the known issue- dropdown doesn't show bottom boarder when clicked.

Last refresh time- I would prefer to have it in two line the way it shows in DM - Date time first line and then Timezone next line

*Add new event*

Adding new event to a RF, adds it to RF itself, it should stale validation, after sign calculation it will be considered as RF version change.

 

*Remove event from RF completely.*  (DECISION-46722)

It will be considered as RF version change.

 

*Edit event*

Any change to an event will version RF. Changes can be done only when RF is draft.

Change input value (value, FT. message category, formula)

Remove Output FT

Change Structure/ Add output FTs

change number of instances

etc.

 

 

*To be handled in this ticket:*

For draft assets, hidden columns are saved as part of the Rule Family perspective. All hidden columns are automatically unhidden when the Modeling Task is submitted . Currently this scenario is not working for event columns.
QA: DM is stuck for moment and Getting SWW error when user associate a decision to KS and click 'OK'
Getting error "Deployment Error: Code Generation failed" after test case execution

testCaseDetails.summary: Verify login functionality with valid username and password
testCaseDetails.description: Test the login process using a valid username and password as described in the story

testSteps.action: Navigate to the login page
testSteps.expectedResult: Login page is displayed

testSteps.action: Enter a valid username and password
testSteps.expectedResult: Username and password are accepted

testSteps.action: Click the login button
testSteps.expectedResult: User is successfully logged in and redirected to the dashboard

preconditions: User has a valid username and password

testCaseDetails.summary: Verify login functionality with invalid username and/or password
testCaseDetails.description: Test the login process using an invalid username and/or password as described in the story

testSteps.action: Navigate to the login page
testSteps.expectedResult: Login page is displayed

testSteps.action: Enter an invalid username and/or password
testSteps.expectedResult: Error message is displayed indicating invalid credentials

testSteps.action: Attempt to click the login button
testSteps.expectedResult: User is not logged in and remains on the login page

preconditions: Login page is accessible

testCaseDetails.summary: Verify login functionality with empty username and/or password fields
testCaseDetails.description: Test the login process when username and/or password fields are left empty

testSteps.action: Navigate to the login page
testSteps.expectedResult: Login page is displayed

testSteps.action: Leave username and/or password fields empty
testSteps.expectedResult: Error message is displayed indicating required fields

testSteps.action: Attempt to click the login button
testSteps.expectedResult: User is not logged in and remains on the login page

preconditions: Login page is accessible

testCaseDetails.summary: Verify that associating a decision to KS and clicking 'OK' does not cause the application to get stuck
testCaseDetails.description: Test the behavior when a user associates a decision to KS and clicks 'OK' to ensure the application does not freeze or become unresponsive.

testSteps.action: Log in to the application using valid credentials
testSteps.expectedResult: User is successfully logged in

testSteps.action: Navigate to the section where decisions can be associated to KS
testSteps.expectedResult: User is able to access the decision association section

testSteps.action: Associate a decision to KS and click 'OK'
testSteps.expectedResult: Application processes the association without freezing or becoming unresponsive

testSteps.action: Monitor application responsiveness for a few seconds after clicking 'OK'
testSteps.expectedResult: Application remains responsive and functional

preconditions: User has access to the application and valid credentials

testCaseDetails.summary: Verify that associating a decision to KS and clicking 'OK' does not trigger a SWW error

testSteps.expectedResult: User is able to access the decision association section

testSteps.action: Associate a decision to KS and click 'OK'
testSteps.expectedResult: No SWW error is displayed and the association is successful

testSteps.action: Verify that no error messages are displayed after clicking 'OK'
testSteps.expectedResult: No SWW error or other error messages are displayed

preconditions: User has access to the application and valid credentials

testCaseDetails.summary: Verify application responsiveness after associating a decision to KS and clicking 'OK'
testCaseDetails.description: Test the application's responsiveness after associating a decision to KS and clicking 'OK' to ensure it remains functional.

testSteps.action: Log in to the application using valid credentials
testSteps.expectedResult: User is successfully logged in

testSteps.action: Navigate to the section where decisions can be associated to KS
testSteps.expectedResult: User is able to access the decision association section

testSteps.expectedResult: Application continues to function normally without delays or errors

testCaseDetails.summary: Verify that associating a decision to KS and clicking 'OK' does not cause the application to hang temporarily
